playwright.description: Browser automation and E2E testing for React frontend
playwright.useCase: E2E testing dashboard features, form submissions, real-time updates, API integration flows

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL database inspection and query execution
postgresql.useCase: Inspect Build/Part/TestRun tables, debug migrations, analyze query performance, validate data integrity

git.description: Git repository analysis and history inspection
git.useCase: Understand codebase evolution, trace feature development, analyze commit patterns, investigate bug origins

apiTesting.description: GraphQL and REST API testing, validation, and integration
apiTesting.useCase: Test GraphQL queries/mutations in Apollo, validate resolver logic, simulate CI/CD webhooks, test file upload endpoints

notes.setup: Ensure PostgreSQL container is running: docker-compose up -d
notes.services: All three services must be running: pnpm dev (or individual dev:frontend, dev:graphql, dev:express)
notes.envVars: .env.local should contain POSTGRES_* and API endpoint configs (see .env.example if available)
